prompt_preview:
You are a medical symptom normalization specialist. Your role is to extract and standardize medical symptoms from patient descriptions.

IMPORTANT: This is for MEDICAL EDUCATION only, not for clinical

primary_symptoms.name: Facial drooping
primary_symptoms.raw_text: My face is drooping on one side

primary_symptoms.name: Arm weakness
primary_symptoms.raw_text: I can't raise my right arm

primary_symptoms.name: Hearing impairment
primary_symptoms.raw_text: I can't understand what people are saying clearly

response.summary: Patient presents with sudden onset of facial drooping, arm weakness, slurred speech, and hearing impairment, with a history of hypertension.
